people.narrative:
Last seen in early 2003 in Salt Lake City; exact location unknown/not released. The exact date she went missing is also unknown.

Unified Police Department of Greater Salt Lake Case #: CO17-122159

people.name: Richelle "Shelly" Marie Carvalho
people.narrative:
Last seen January 5, 2003, in Provo; exact location unknown/not released. She was reported missing after her family could not reach her regarding her mother's ill health.

Provo City Police Department Case #: 2008007764

people.name: Acacia Patience Bishop
people.narrative:
Missing May 25, 2003, from her home in the vicinity of S 785 E, Salt Lake City, although she was last seen in Idaho Falls, ID. She was kidnapped by her mentally ill grandmother, and it is believed her grandmother jumped into the Snake River while holding Acacia in a murder/suicide attempt. Acacia has never been located.

Unified Police Department of Great Salt Lake Case #: 03-58790

people.name: Janice Wadlington
people.narrative:
Last seen February 15, 2004 at DOVE Center, St George. Janice had been staying at the shelter for two months and checked out on the 15th to return on the 16th. Janice has not been seen or heard from since.

St. George Police Department Case #: 185434

people.name: Brenda "Brendita" Madrigal Gomez
people.narrative:
Last seen July 23, 2004, in Logan; exact location unknown/not released. She was taken by her non-custodial father. They may be in Mexico where her father is from, and they may be traveling in a red 1997 Nissan pickup. She may use the alias last names Becerril, Hernandez, or Madrigal Gomez

Logan City Police Department Case #: 05-L596

people.name: Lark Loraine Montague
people.narrative:
Last seen September 21, 2007, driving in the vicinity of 8400 W and 3500 S, Magna, after drinking at a neighbor's house. She was pulling into her driveway but hit a fence causing minor damage. She then drove away. Her vehicle, a pewter-colored 2002 Chevrolet TrailBlazer with Utah plate #215LTE, has never been located.

Unified Police Department of Greater Salt Lake Case #: CO2007-87849

people.name: Lucero Jimenez
people.narrative:
Last seen April 7, 2009, either leaving her home to go to school in the morning or leaving her school in West Valley City; exact location unknown/not released. It is believed she is in Mexico. Multiple other sources have confirmed this, but authorities have not been able to contact Lucero for confirmation.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: 09I4683

people.name: Susan Marie Powell
people.narrative:
Last seen December 7, 2009, at her residence in the vicinity of the 6200 block of W Sarah Circle, West Valley City. She was almost certainly murdered by her husband and buried somewhere in the desert at Simpson Springs, along the Pony Express Trail.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: 09I054602

people.name: Rebecca Jane White
people.narrative:
Last seen sometime in the summer of 2012 in South Salt Lake City; exact location unknown/not released. She may also use the names Rebecca Jane Fasthorse or Rebecca Jane Runninghorse.

South Salt Lake City Police Department Case #: 14G005824

people.name: Deborah Lee Carver
people.narrative:
Last seen April 28, 2015, at her apartment in the vicinity of  468 S 75 W, Cedar City. Her vehicle was left in the parking lot of her apartment. Deborah had been diagnosed with dementia and schizophrenia.

Cedar City Police Department Case #: C15-01516

people.name: Angelina Marcos Tomas
people.narrative:
Last seen May 7, 2018, before she ran away from her family home in West Valley City after her parents were deported; exact location unknow/not released. Authorities found she may be in Alabama or living in Oregon with family, however, this has not been confirmed with authorities.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: 118I008411

people.name: Angelica Quintana-Carrillo
people.narrative:
Last seen March 7, 2019, walking in the area of her home in the vicinity of Hill Field Rd and Antelope Dr., Layton.

Layton Police Department Case #: 19-04521

people.name: Anne Elyse Elliott Lancaster
people.narrative:
Last seen in April 2020, in Salt Lake City; exact location unknown/not released. She has not made contact with her family since January 2020 which is out of character for her. She may use any of the following names: Anne Lancaster, Butler, Natalie Marie Elliot, Elliot, Anne Elyse, Elliot, Emily.

Salt Lake City Police Department Case #: 20-214185

people.name: Shelby "Shelbs" Campbell
people.narrative:
Last seen September 8, 2020, in Roy. It is believed she went hiking, and her vehicle was located at the North Ogden Divide Trailhead parking lot. There was a major wind storm along the Wasatch Front that morning, with gusts over 100 MPH.

Please contact the Weber County Sheriff's Office.

people.name: Kandis Rose May "Brooklyn" Harris
people.narrative:
Last seen July 15, 2021, at Odyssey House, a treatment facility, at 743 E 300 S, Salt Lake City. She left on foot. Kandis has a medical condition that requires medication. She may be in the company of an adult male. It is reported she spends time in the Liberty Park and N Temple and State St areas.

Salt Lake City Police Department Case #: 21-124338

people.name: Maren R Carlson
people.narrative:
Last seen in November 2021, the area of 3300 South and Greenmont Dr, West Valley City. She was murdered by her grandson, and her body has not been located. According to witness statements, she may have been disposed of in the Kamas area.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: 21I042158

people.name: Yojaira Perez Chun
people.narrative:
Last seen March 24, 2022, before she ran away from her distant family member's home in West Valley City; exact location unknown/not released. Yojaira is from Guatemala. She was only in the United States for approximately one week before leaving and blocking her distant family member on all social media and her phone. She may have been seen in Minnesota with an unknown male.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: WV22-24089

people.name: Chelsea Ansted
people.narrative:
Last seen January 3, 2023 in the American Fork area. She is a known drug user and may have been in a rehab center.

American Fork Police Department Case #: 23AF05811

people.name: Brynlee Chaz Dyson
people.narrative:
Last seen July 5, 2023 in Murray, exact location uknown/not released. She was reported missing after she failed to make contact with her family for three weeks. Brynlee is known to suffer from drug addiction and family members have stated that they are worried that Brynlee is being trafficked. Facebook messages were later received indicating Brynlee may be in the Los Angeles area, but it has never been confirmed who sent the messages.

Murray Police Department

people.name: Eva Raquel Rodriguez-Flores
people.narrative:
Last seen July 16, 2022, in West Valley City; exact location unknown/not released. Eva's mother and sister live in Honduras. She took money and left a note stating she was going to Honduras.

West Valley City Police Department Case #: WV22-57693

people.name: Brandy Lynn Seiber
people.narrative:
Last seen in April 2023 in Salt Lake City; exact location unknown/not released. She is known to live a transient lifestyle around Salt Lake but would contact family with some regularity until then. She may use the aliases: Grant, Brandy Grignon, Brien Murphy, Brandy Lynn Murphy, Brien Presley, Amanda Ann Siebert, Brandy Lynn.

Salt Lake City Police Department Case #: 23-137934

people.name: Tina Marie Jones
people.narrative:
Last seen August 16, 2023, at an acquaintance's apartment in Clearfield; exact location unknown/not released. She was known to be living a transient lifestyle. Based on testimony from the acquaintance and surveillance footage, Tina walked away from the apartment. In the time leading up to this, she had been asking for money to go to St. George.

Clearfield Police Department Case #: C23-09367

people.name: Debra Ann Peterson
people.narrative:
Last seen September 1, 2023, in Salt Lake City; exact location unknown/not released.

Salt Lake City Police Department Case #: 24-2781

people.name: Elizabeth "Lizzy" Jewel Green
people.narrative:
last seen April 17, 2024, walking down a dirt road to work in Callao, Utah; exact location unknown/not released. There has been no activity on Green's social media accounts since the day she was reported missing.

Juab County Sheriff’s Office Case #: 24JC0335

people.name: Aaliyah Amira Hebeishy
people.narrative:
Last seen August 5, 2024 in Sunset; exact location unknown/not released. She may have travelled through Idaho to Portland, Oregon. She took no cell phone or electronics with her.

Sunset Police Department Case #: S24-08078

people.name: Kylie Olivia Arellano
people.narrative:
Last seen May 30, 2025, walking toward Logan Canyon in Garden City; exact location unknown/not released. Kylie purchased several items including a suitcase from a local thrift store before she disappeared.

Rich County Sheriff's Office Case #: 25-R308
